title: Software Update - DFU - Software Update screen
scenario: Software Update screen displays correct message and active Continue button when headset on outdated firmware is connected
steps: 1. Pair and connect a headset running outdated firmware to the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to access Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, locate and tap on the Software Update tab.
5. Tap the Update button on the Software Update screen.
6. Observe the Software Update screen that appears.
expected: The Software Update screen displays the message: "An update is available for your device. The update takes a few minutes to complete. Let's get started" and the Continue button is available and active.
